**Story 16.2 Frontend UI Component Complete (2026-04-09)**:

- **Objective:** Implement WordExamplesPanel component with deduped fetching, responsive design, and accessibility
- **Status:** ✅ WORK_PACKAGE_COMPLETE
- **Pipeline Outcome:** All 7 stages executed successfully
  - Stage 1 — Design Planning: PASS (92% confidence, 5 packages, blockers resolved)
  - Stage 2 — Implementation Loop: PASS (9 files, 11/11 tests)
  - Stage 3 — Frontend Review Auditor: PASS (0 findings, 98% confidence, but crypto bug caught by author)
  - Stage 4 — Security Auditor: SKIP (no sensitive files)
  - Stage 5 — Docs Curator: PASS (docs updated, technical challenges documented)
  - Stage 6 — User Approval & Commit: PASS (user approved, committed dbae07c)
  - Stage 7 — Close: PASS (tests re-verified 11/11, build SUCCESS, docs finalized)

- **Key Deliverables:**
  - 9 files created (components, hooks, services, tests, styles)
  - 11/11 tests PASSING (8 RTL + 3 unit)
  - Code refactored to conventions: type/interface, named/React.FC, direct/React.* hooks
  - Web Crypto API bug fixed (removed Node.js import("crypto") fallback)
  - Build verified: SUCCESS (2.10s, no errors)
  - Commit hash: dbae07c (11 files changed, 777 insertions)

- **Technical Challenges Resolved:**
  - SWR not in deps → custom useExamples hook with 60s in-memory dedupe + sessionStorage
  - Audio endpoint undefined (Story 16.3) → mocked audioService.ts
  - Analytics missing → stub analyticsService.ts
  - Responsive accessibility → WCAG 2.1 AA (ARIA labels, 44px+ targets, keyboard nav)
  - Crypto import bug → simplified to Web Crypto API only

- **Lessons Learned:**
  - Frontend review should include "Build & Runtime Compatibility" checklist (bundler, Node modules, import validation)
  - Static code review cannot catch environmental/build issues; runtime validation needed
  - Lessons stored in /memories/repo/review-gaps.md

- **Next Phase:** Story 16.3 (Example Caching & Performance) unblocked; audioService mock ready for real endpoint integration
